steps.title: Compare the dot plots
steps.content: The dot plots have the same shape. Each value in class B is shifted the same distance to the right from the corresponding value in class A.

steps.title: Apply the shift rule
steps.content: Adding the same constant to every data value changes the mean, but it does not change how far the values are spread out from the mean. Therefore, the two standard deviations are equal.

steps.title: Choose the comparison
steps.content: The statement that says the standard deviations are equal is the matching comparison. The answer is B.
